arts.ttl: Arsenal can use Saliba agent to help seal signing – Gunners advantage due to relationship
arts.sum: Arsenal have included Sevilla’s Lucien Agoumé in their target list, according to Foot Mercato. Sevilla took the defensive midfielder on loan in the winter 2024 market and made his stay permanent in the summer. Agoumé has been a regular this season, making 18 appearances, and his performances haven’t gone unnoticed. arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Ipswich: Why Mikel Arteta should avoid Everton, Tottenham repeat in Premier League battle
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole why the Gunners should not struggle to break down Ipswich Town in the manner that they did against Everton.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer gamble finally pays off as brutal Mikel Arteta decision delivers title boost
arts.sum: For much of this season, Arsenal looked like they could have done with Emile Smith Rowe being back at the Emirates Stadium. Chelsea looked set to move four points clear of Arsenal once again as Enzo Maresca saw his side leading 1-0 in the 81st minute .
